observations.claim: The repository uses FastAPI with OAuth2 and JWT for authentication, managing user registration and login processes through defined routes and supporting functions. Key files include 'app/routers/auth.py' for authentication logic, and 'app/dependencies.py' for token handling. Testing is done in 'tests/test_auth.py' and 'tests/test_tasks.py', ensuring authentication functionality. The 'gateway.py' file performs smoke tests, further validating authentication processes.
Runtime verification for 'Authentication': gateway.py returned status=success

The repository uses FastAPI to implement an API with authentication and task management functionality. Key files include main application setup in app/main.py, authentication endpoints in app/routers/auth.py, and task operations in app/routers/tasks.py, all supported by app dependencies defined in app/dependencies.py. Test configuration is found in tests/conftest.py.
Runtime verification for 'API': gateway.py returned status=success

The business logic in this repository is implemented through FastAPI routers and services that manage authentication (registration and login) and task management (creation and listing) with task limits. Key files are app/routers/auth.py for authentication, app/routers/tasks.py and app/services/task_service.py for task operations, alongside app/jobs.py for scheduled job processes.
Runtime verification for 'Business Logic': gateway.py returned status=success
